calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-23-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Margaret Ashwell.
Esra Jung, Esq. for Plaintiff: Keum Ok Kim, present with Korean Interpreter: Song Park, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants: Travis Keone Roary, JT Roary and Ablerta Roary in the sum of $712,420.73
(Med. $212,112.23, pain & suffering $500,000.00 and costs $308.50).
Counsel to prepare Judgment.

July 23, 2004
Jugment submitted and signed by Comm. Kaplan.
